Interface HasOrigin

All Known Subinterfaces:
BuiltInRule, ExternalSolverRule, Rule, Sort
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule, AbstractBlockContractRule, AbstractLoopContractRule, AbstractLoopInvariantRule, AbstractSideProofRule, AbstractSort, AntecTaclet, ArraySort, BlockContractExternalRule, BlockContractInternalRule, CloseAfterMerge, FindTaclet, GenericSort, InfFlowBlockContractInternalRule, InfFlowContractAppTaclet, InfFlowLoopContractInternalRule, InfFlowUseOperationContractRule, InfFlowWhileInvariantRule, IsabelleRule, JmlAssertRule, LoopApplyHeadRule, LoopContractExternalRule, LoopContractInternalRule, LoopScopeInvariantRule, MergeRule, ModalitySideProofRule, NoFindTaclet, NullSort, ObserverToUpdateRule, OneStepSimplifier, ParametricSortInstance, ProgramSVSort, ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionNonStringObjectSort, ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionStringSort, ProxySort, QueryExpand, QuerySideProofRule, RewriteTaclet, SetStatementRule, SMTRule, SortImpl, SuccTaclet, Taclet, UseDependencyContractRule, UseOperationContractRule, WdBlockContractInternalRule, WdWhileInvariantRule, WhileInvariantRule
public interface HasOrigin
Classes with this interface provides a simple human-readable String where they came from.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default @Nullable String
    getOrigin()
    Information about the origin of the rule.

  • Method Details

    • getOrigin

      default @Nullable String getOrigin()

      Information about the origin of the rule.

      Should be a human-readable location where the user can find the declaration of the rule.

      This field is set by the parser with [url]:[lineNumber]
